slices.title: Monorepo and quality foundation
slices.deliverable: pnpm/Turborepo workspace with TanStack Start, Hono, strict TypeScript, tests, architecture checks, and CI.

slices.title: Identity, organizations, Projects, and authorization
slices.deliverable: Authenticated organizations, memberships, Projects, and policy enforcement.

slices.title: Persistence, audit, and outbox
slices.deliverable: Postgres schema, migrations, Blob integration, audit log, and transactional outbox.

slices.title: Project workspace shell
slices.deliverable: Responsive Chat/Documents/Sources shell.

slices.title: Uploads and immutable sources
slices.deliverable: Resumable PDF upload, Source, SourceVersion, Blob object, permissions, and status UI.

slices.title: PDF parsing and evidence viewer
slices.deliverable: Normalized PDF elements, exact page locators, and source viewer.

slices.title: Hybrid indexing and retrieval
slices.deliverable: Permission-filtered lexical, vector, metadata retrieval and evaluation fixtures.

slices.title: Persistent streaming Chat
slices.deliverable: Persistent AI SDK chat, model registry, attachments, tool events, and resumable streams.

slices.title: Claims, evidence, and exact citations
slices.deliverable: Grounded responses, EvidenceSpans, Claims, exact citations, and verification.

slices.title: Canonical Markdown document system
slices.deliverable: Document tree, stable blocks, revisions, Plate canvas, CodeMirror, and typed patches.

slices.title: Grounded PDF-to-document vertical slice
slices.deliverable: Create Project through persisted cited Markdown document.

slices.title: Web discovery and capture
slices.deliverable: Search, candidate review, HTTP-first capture, Playwright escalation, and immutable snapshots.

slices.title: Research contracts and durable runs
slices.deliverable: Editable plans, Research Runs, progress, interruption, retries, budgets, and approvals.

slices.title: Research engine adapters
slices.deliverable: Provider-neutral OpenAI, Gemini, Tavily, Perplexity, and isolated open-source adapters.

slices.title: Bounded multi-agent control plane
slices.deliverable: Typed task packets, specialist workers, coordinator, budgets, cancellation, and integration.

slices.title: Long-form document production
slices.deliverable: Section contracts, global consistency ledger, assembly, editorial and citation audits.

slices.title: Living knowledge maintenance
slices.deliverable: Source diffs, claim revalidation, dependency traversal, and minimal safe patches.

slices.title: Public and private publishing
slices.deliverable: Projection policies, privacy and rights audits, immutable PublicationSnapshots, and withdrawal.

slices.title: Research Studio artifacts
slices.deliverable: Typed artifact system, canvases, charts, evidence graphs, media, study, and export adapters.

slices.title: GitHub source and contribution platform
slices.deliverable: GitHub App, commit-pinned indexing, sandboxed patches, validation, and draft pull requests.

slices.title: Connector platform
slices.deliverable: Google Workspace, MCP, connector SDK, synchronization, revocation, and additional source families.

slices.title: Developer platform API
slices.deliverable: OpenAPI, Operations, SSE, webhooks, SDKs, CLI, and MCP.

slices.title: Inspectable Project memory
slices.deliverable: Versioned memory, decisions, conflicts, user controls, consolidation, and forgetting.

slices.title: Commercial and customer operations
slices.deliverable: Onboarding, imports, portability, entitlements, usage, billing, notifications, analytics, and support.

slices.title: Enterprise security, governance, accessibility, and recovery
slices.deliverable: SSO, SCIM, residency, provider governance, abuse controls, WCAG, internationalization, and disaster recovery.

slices.title: Product-readiness and launch conformance
slices.deliverable: End-to-end quality, security, recovery, cost, support, accessibility, and product-truth gates.
